title: Grandfather (93) the best man at wedding
description: MOSSEL BAY NEWS - It was an extremely...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - It was an extremely special day filled with celebration and emotion when the 93-year-old Tarka resident Nicklaas Sebrandt recently stood side by side with his grandson, Kevin Brown, as his best man at his wedding at Harry Giddey Park.","html":"MOSSEL BAY NEWS - It was an extremely special day filled with celebration and emotion when the 93-year-old Tarka resident Nicklaas Sebrandt recently stood side by side with his grandson, Kevin Brown, as his best man at his wedding at Harry Giddey Park."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"Brown married the love of his life, Renay, on 15 November and told Mossel Bay Advertiser it was a privilege to have his grandfather there to give him away, and to be at his side."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Brown said he had lost both his parents a few years ago and Sebrandt stood in for them, supporting his grandson when his parents couldn’t be there for him any more.","html":"Brown said he had lost both his parents a few years ago and Sebrandt stood in for them, supporting his grandson when his parents couldn’t be there for him any more."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"“I have so much respect for him and I feel honoured that he could be by my side as my best man,” he said.","html":"“I have so much respect for him and I feel honoured that he could be by my side as my best man,” he said."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Brown said it was a beautiful day for everyone, and that he was overjoyed his grandfather could also be there, especially at his age.","html":"Brown said it was a beautiful day for everyone, and that he was overjoyed his grandfather could also be there, especially at his age."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sebrandt was born and raised in Mossel Bay, growing up and still residing in Tarka, where Brown and his wife live, too.","html":"Sebrandt was born and raised in Mossel Bay, growing up and still residing in Tarka, where Brown and his wife live, too."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sebrandt has seven children, 14 grandchildren and 18 great-grandchildren.","html":"Sebrandt has seven children, 14 grandchildren and 18 great-grandchildren."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Renay Brown on her wedding day. Photo: Supplied","html":"Renay Brown on her wedding day. Photo: Supplied"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
